title: Springtrap: The Returning
description: He burns, but he always comes back... and this time, he's not alone.
body:
The Springtrap mod brings a deadly animatronic into your world. Springtrap will spawn near players and use a mix of brutal attacks, from dashing and axe throws to shield breaking and bleeding effects. He stays inactive by day, but at night, he hunts relentlessly. If he’s burned, he transforms into Burntrap, who’s slower but immune to fire and can control golems. You’ll also encounter Scraptrap, who can heal through items, and Springlock Victims, twisted beings created through failed suits. Players can even enter suits themselves, but beware, springlock failure will be fatal… Are you ready to survive the night?


## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why are Mobs not spawning?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► How can I disable Springtraps Redstone Manipulation?

Springtraps Redstone Manipulation can be disabled if you set the gamerule "springtrapRedstoneManipulation" to false.

► How can I disable Springtrap changing mode from active to inactive?

Springtrap changed modes during day and night. This can be disabled if you set the gamerule "changeSpringtrapMode" to false.

► How can I disable Springtrap breaking blocks?

Springtrap breaking blocks can be disabled if you set the gamerule "mobGriefing" to false.

► How can I get a Fire Axe?

A Fire Axe can be dropped when killing Springtrap, Scraptrap, Burntrap or Springlock Victims with a low chance.

► How can I get Springlock Suit Armor?

Springlock Suit Parts can be obtained when killing a Springlock Victim.


</details>



![Springtrap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/193cd5e0502cc822957ad64ae34f9e94ce30b6de.png)

Springtrap is a deadly animatronic that spawns with the iconic voice line "I always come back." During the day, he's inactive, but at night, he becomes fully aggressive. He has very high health, armor, and strength. When attacking, Springtrap can break shields, dash towards the player, and throw his axe from a distance, inflicting a bleeding effect. He’s fast, and after killing a target, he will briefly pause before locking onto the next victim. Every kill heals him slightly. He targets players, villagers, and golems, and his fear aura causes nearby players to suffer from Slowness and Weakness. When fighting, his hits can also apply Slowness to his victims. Springtrap is vulnerable to fire, and if killed by flames, he transforms into Burntrap. If his health drops below 10, and the walkes into items, he will take them and turn into Scraptrap with 30%. When his health drops below 30 hearts, he enters a rage mode, drastically increasing his speed and damage. He also cannot swim, and will sink in water, but can destroy blocks in his path without mercy.
 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
